channel.title: Ai on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: Introduction to Convolutional Neural Network
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> Warning! I wrote this article back in uni with Latex and then used some manually editing in combination with https://papertohtml.org/, to convert it to HTML. So this text could have errors due to the conversion. In addition, this article is not the newest state of research. Abstract In recent years, significant advancements have been made in the field of Machine Learning, particularly in the domain of image-related tasks. This paper aims to provide a comprehensive overview of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), a powerful class of neural networks widely employed for image analysis and processing.
